action: Open Google Chrome. In the address bar, type 'https://www.indmoney.com/stocks/category/buy-stocks' and press Enter to load the page.
fallback_action: Perform a Google search using Internet Explorer

recipe.steps: The task is to open Google Chrome and navigate to a specific URL. On the current screen, I see the Google Chrome web browser icon (ID: 598) among the available application icons. The first step is to open Google Chrome by clicking its icon.
Google Chrome is now open, and the address bar is visible at the top of the window (Box ID: 5). The next step is to click on the address bar to focus it, so I can type the required URL.

The address bar is now focused and ready for input. The next step is to type the specified URL 'https://www.indmoney.com/stocks/category/buy-stocks' into the address bar so that we can navigate to the required page.
The URL has been typed into the address bar, but the page has not yet been loaded. The next step is to press Enter to navigate to the specified URL and load the page.

The Enter key has been pressed after typing the URL in the address bar. The page is now loading or may have already loaded. To confirm that the page has loaded and to see the content, I should wait for a moment to allow the website to finish loading.
